reason: Successfully navigated to the SuperAgent app, located and clicked the "QA-20260718-014107-ryd9" agent, verified it was idle, sent a message asking "Hello! What is 2+2?", and received a correct response containing "4".
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — App loaded successfully, displaying sidebar with two agents including "QA-20260718-014107-ryd9"
Step 2: Located and clicked agent "QA-20260718-014107-ryd9" in sidebar — Successfully navigated to agent details page with full agent configuration visible
Step 3: Verified agent status — Status indicator showed "idle", which is an acceptable status per requirements (running or idle)
Step 4: Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in the message input field — Text appeared correctly in the input field and send button became enabled
Step 5: Clicked send button to submit the message — Message sent successfully, creating a new session titled "Basic Math Question Session", and agent status changed to "working"
Step 6: Waited for agent response — Agent responded within approximately 1 second (shown as "Worked for 1s" in the interface)
Step 7: Verified response mentions "4" — Response clearly displays the number "4" on a separate line, correctly answering the mathematical question 2+2=4
Step 8: Took screenshot of the conversation — Screenshot captured showing the complete exchange with user message "Hello! What is 2+2?" and agent response "4"
